codeReview.summary: The fix commit directly addresses all three blocking gaps from the prior Agents review: the Manual filter chip now uses locale messages, both visible +N more overflow summaries route through a formatted i18n key, and department card count badges/labels now use localized count-label messages instead of inline English strings. The scoped regression test coverage and current file contents match the fix description, and I did not find a remaining covered first-screen localization regression in the reviewed surface.

summary: Reviewed the fix handoff, transcript skeleton, prior failing review, prior feature diff, and fix diff for agents-leftover-core-copy-fix. The new commit af2b9be resolves the previously blocked Manual/+N more/agent-count/lead-copy gaps in src/components/agents/agents-workspace.tsx with focused locale-message wiring and matching regression coverage, so this fix passes scrutiny.
